fields.name: Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the requisition worksheet template you are creating.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a description of the requisition worksheet template you are creating.

fields.name: Page ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the page that is used to show the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Recurring
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the requisition worksheet template will be a recurring requisition worksheet.

fields.name: Page Caption
fields.tooltip: Specifies the displayed name of the journal or worksheet that uses the template.

fields.name: Increment Batch Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies if batch names using this template are automatically incremented. Example: The posting following BATCH001 is automatically named BATCH002.

fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of the requisition worksheet template.
